query:
-- Match Burleigh Waters (182 Acanthus Ave) to Zambrero - Burleigh Waters (C2735)
-- Match Frankston Cash Centre (449 Nepean Hwy) to Zambrero Frankston (C7571)
UPDATE services SET 
  customerExternalId = 'C2735',
  customerName = 'Zambrero - Burleigh Waters',
  status = 'active'
WHERE externalId = 'S0726';

UPDATE services SET 
  customerExternalId = 'C7571',
  customerName = 'Zambrero Frankston',
  status = 'active'
WHERE externalId = 'S0703';
